_schema.description: Cross-session tactical lessons for the multi-agent Lean prover (issue #1081 Part 2/3). Conservation state: this file persists across iterations, unlike ephemeral attempt history. Populated by the prover at end of session; this committed version is the {} placeholder.
_schema.note: project keys: 'stable_marriage', 'voting', 'social_choice', etc. Keep entries deduplicated by goal_signature.
